lead_profile_text: Property with own entrance from pavement (not a flat); semi-furnished (sofa, dining table/chairs); 1 parking permit available. Previously had teacher tenant for 5-6 years; well-maintained. Currently listed for sale but owners will not go below minimum price. Three-way decision in play: sell, LTL, or STL. Owners based in Poland wanting flexibility for personal use and to sell if a good offer comes in.
emotional_profile: Engaged and pragmatic. Decision-making delayed by overseas ownership and three-way consideration (sell/LTL/STL). Responds to logic and data — framing STL as non-committal holding strategy while waiting for the right sale offer.
delay_trigger_phrases: market conditions poor due to new legislation
want flexibility to use property occasionally and sell if good offer comes

top_objections.text: Want flexibility to use property occasionally and sell if good offer comes
top_objections.zac_response: Calendar blocking for personal use; STL contract does not prevent accepting a sale offer; 3-month notice to exit

what_moved_them: Calendar blocking capability for personal use
Ability to accept sale offer during management term

conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Demonstrate STL as non-committal holding strategy compatible with sale option; send LTL vs STL net comparison with specific location figures

conversion_gaps.gap: Location not confirmed — potential mortgage or planning restriction unknown
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Confirm property address and check for any restrictions

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (vs standard 15%+VAT) expiring 31 May 2026; contractor partnership angle with Mateusz's installation company raised as potential mutual referral opportunity
zac_income_intro: £1,233/month net (£14,796 annually); 12 competing properties in under-competitive market (avg 4.6/5, avg 18 reviews); best month July ~£1,480, lowest January ~£1,024
zac_reassurance_phrases: accept sale offer at any time
